patch.value: Verification covers the code path users and CI will exercise: local build/test/audit/pack, generated changelog freshness, temporary pm install from the checkout, GitHub issue and alert state via gh, and npm registry state.
Verify pm-changelog release workflow and package install path

Run local validation for the new release workflow, current package checks, clean temporary pm package installation, GitHub issue/dependency/vulnerability state, npm registry status, and self-generated changelog behavior before publishing the next public release.

- npm run release:check passes after changelog regeneration.
- Clean temporary folder can install the package with pm install from the local checkout and generate a changelog.
- gh CLI confirms no open reported issues, no Dependabot alerts, and current Actions state.
- npm audit and npm outdated report no actionable findings.
- npm registry latest version is checked before and after publication.

value.author: codex
value.text: Verification scope includes GitHub,npm,pm package install,changelog self-generation,and secret-history checks.

value.author: codex
value.text: Run the temp install after build artifacts are updated so pm install exercises the shipped runtime.

value.author: codex
value.text: pm package doctor should be run from the temp consumer project after installing the package.

value.command: clean temp pm install and pm changelog generate

value.author: codex
value.text: Temp install evidence: /tmp/pm-changelog-v2026-05-23-6-local-P2eE22 installed the local checkout with pm install,package doctor passed,pm changelog generate wrote a temp CHANGELOG.md,and rg found Verify local v2026.05.23-6 package install.

patch.value: Completed release verification for the new workflow and package state: release checks passed, dependencies and audit are clean, GitHub issue/PR/alert state was checked with gh, npm registry latest was verified, and a clean temp pm project installed the local checkout and generated a changelog.

npm run release:check passed with 18 node:test tests, npm audit --omit=dev found 0 vulnerabilities, npm outdated returned {}, gh issue list open returned [], Dependabot alerts returned [], gh secret list shows NPM_TOKEN present, npm view reports latest 2026.5.23-5 before this release, and /tmp/pm-changelog-v2026-05-23-6-local-P2eE22 generated CHANGELOG.md with the smoke item.
Release readiness verification proves the package remains buildable, testable, auditable, installable through pm package flows, and clean against current GitHub and npm reports before publication.
Release workflow and package install verification completed with green local gates, clean GitHub/npm checks, and clean temp pm install smoke.
